title: Device Home Screen - Bluetooth turned off
scenario: Verify that a Bluetooth headset reconnected via mobile settings after Bluetooth is toggled off and on is shown as connected in the app's device list.
steps: Launch the app with a Bluetooth headset connected.
Turn off Bluetooth while the app is running.
Observe the device list in the app.
Reconnect the headset via mobile Bluetooth settings.
Check the device list in the app.
expected: The headset is shown as connected in the device list.
